0.text: Minimal emphysematous changes in both lungs

1.text: Several nodules in both lungs, largest measuring 4.5 mm in diameter, located in the posterior segment of the left lower lobe

2.text: Areas of linear atelectasis in the medial segment of the right middle lobe

3.text: Areas of linear atelectasis in the lingular segment of the left upper lobe

4.text: Areas of linear atelectasis in the posterior segments of both lower lobes
